subject: Noise2Map error - LibTorchSharp
body:
Hi everyone,

I'm having an error when I try to run Noise2Map. I'm trying to run it with 
just one tomogram and it crashes trying to load the library LibTorchSharp. 
I tried to create a symbolic link inside /home/exx/.conda/envs/warp/bin, 
but I still have the same error. 
Does anyone know how to fix this?

Thanks!
Juliana

Command: Noise2Map --observation1 even --observation2 odd --angpix 13.6 
--batchsize 4 --dont_flatten_spectrum true --iterations 10000 
--dont_augment true --gpuid_preprocess 0 --gpuid_network 0

Here is my terminal output:
 Loading mask... done.

Preparing data:
Preparing Position_1_2_13.60Apx...  Done.

Loading model, 22963 MB free.
Unhandled exception. System.DllNotFoundException: Unable to load shared 
library 'LibTorchSharp' or one of its dependencies. In order to help 
diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're 
using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable:

file: No such file or directory
libtorch.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
